name: Harboes Bryggeri A/S
summary: Harboes Bryggeri A/S develops, produces, and markets beverages and malt-based food ingredients. The company offers beer under the Bear Beer, Harboe Beer, Darguner, and Puls brands; non-alcoholic dark malts under the Hyper Malt brand; energy drinks under the XRAY brand; and soft drinks under the Harboe Sodas, the Ego Organic, Caribia Ginger Beer, and Other brands. It also provides orange, apple, pineapple, grapefruit, and pear juices under the PURE brand; and specialty products under the GB brand, as well as offers drink mixer under the Eagle brand. The company sells its products to approximately 90 countries worldwide. Harboes Bryggeri A/S was founded in 1883 and is headquartered in Sk√É¬¶lsk√É¬∏r, Denmark.
